subject: A humanoid figure with wild white hair leaps through the air in a rocky canyon or cave, body arched backward mid-somersault, holding a curved blade in one hand and a length of rope or whip in the other; a large coiled rope loop hangs in the foreground left
description: A figure with white wild hair twisted mid-air in a dynamic aerial maneuver inside a warm orange-red rocky canyon or cavern. The body is fully arched in a backflip or dodge, with the legs kicking upward and head thrown back. One hand grips a curved blade or hook, the other extends a length of rope or whip. The figure wears dark layered leather armor with strap-work and a hooded cloak. In the lower left foreground, a large coil of rope or magical binding loops and curves, connected to the weapon-hand. The rocky walls glow amber-orange; the floor below is pale stone. The composition is kinetic and diagonal, all motion vectors tilting away from the ground.
foreground: Coiled rope loop on canyon floor; figure mid-aerial twist above
background: Orange-red rocky canyon walls with warm ambient light
emotion: acrobatic exertion, evasive mid-leap, full-body kinetic tension
